description: Design sprint: discovery brief, visual composition, implementation, and user testing in 4 parallel tracks

missions.Discovery: Research the problem space. Analyze competitors, user needs, and constraints. Produce a discovery brief with requirements.
missions.Composer: Design the visual system. Define layout, typography, color palette, component hierarchy. Create mockups as ASCII or code.
missions.Builder: Implement the designs in React + Tailwind. Pixel-perfect translation. Dark mode. Responsive. Animations with Framer Motion.
missions.Customer-Zero: Test every screen as the first user. Click every button. Check mobile. Check dark mode. File bugs with screenshots.

panes.name: Discovery
panes.focus: Problem space research, competitor analysis, discovery brief

panes.name: Composer
panes.focus: Visual system, layout, typography, color, component hierarchy

panes.name: Builder
panes.focus: React + Tailwind implementation, dark mode, responsive, animations

panes.name: Customer-Zero
panes.focus: User testing, click every button, mobile check, bug filing
